nasb.text: But as for me, by Your abundant lovingkindness I will enter Your house, At Your holy temple I will bow in reverence for You.

esv.text: But I, through the abundance of your steadfast love, will enter your house. I will bow down toward your holy temple in the fear of you.

cnv.text: 至於我，我必憑著你豐盛的慈愛， 進入你的殿； 我要存著敬畏你的心， 向你的聖所敬拜。

ccb.text: 因为你有无限的慈爱， 我要进入你的居所， 我要满怀敬畏地向你的圣殿下拜。

csbs.text: 至于我，我要藉着你丰盛的慈爱，来到你的家； 因着对你的敬畏，向你圣洁的殿下拜。
